parameters.query:
SELECT s.state AS state, s.entry_id AS entry_id, e.raw_transcript AS raw_transcript, e.turn_count AS turn_count
FROM (SELECT {{ $json.chat_id }}::bigint AS cid) c
LEFT JOIN sessions s ON s.telegram_chat_id = c.cid
LEFT JOIN entries e ON e.id = s.entry_id;

parameters.text:
Mirror is online.

Send /journal when you want to start an entry.
Send /cancel mid-entry to abandon it.

parameters.query:
WITH new_entry AS (
  INSERT INTO entries (telegram_chat_id, raw_transcript, turn_count)
  VALUES ({{ $json.chat_id }}::bigint, '', 0)
  RETURNING id
)
INSERT INTO sessions (telegram_chat_id, entry_id, state, updated_at)
VALUES ({{ $json.chat_id }}::bigint, (SELECT id FROM new_entry), 'awaiting_intake', NOW())
ON CONFLICT (telegram_chat_id) DO UPDATE
  SET entry_id = (SELECT id FROM new_entry),
      state = 'awaiting_intake',
      updated_at = NOW();
SELECT id AS entry_id FROM entries WHERE telegram_chat_id = {{ $json.chat_id }}::bigint ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;

parameters.text:
Right. What's on your mind today?

You can hit any of the 5 areas — wins, what went wrong, stress, trading, consulting — or just talk and I'll guide. Skipping any is fine.

parameters.query:
UPDATE entries SET status = 'cancelled' WHERE id = {{ $json.entry_id }};
UPDATE sessions SET state = 'idle', entry_id = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE telegram_chat_id = {{ $json.chat_id }}::bigint;

parameters.text: Cancelled. Nothing saved. Send /journal when ready.
No active entry. Send /journal to start one.

parameters.query:
UPDATE sessions SET state = 'reflecting', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE telegram_chat_id = {{ $('Parse Intake Response').first().json.chat_id }}::bigint;
